input.user_input: Is there a force majeure clause? Does it cover pandemics or government-ordered shutdowns?

actual: I do not have access to any documents right now. Please upload the contract or document you would like me to review, and I will gladly check for a force majeure clause and determine whether it covers pandemics or government-ordered shutdowns.
